html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be Played to cause small geysers to shoot up from the ocean, doing damage to creatures and structures.”

-

The Strident Trident is a Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Return of Them. The Strident Trident Blueprint is dropped by the Crab King upon death. It requires 3 Gnarwail Horns, 4 Kelp Fronds, and 2 Twigs to craft.

The Strident Trident can be used as a melee weapon to deal 51 damage on land and 76.5 damage on the Ocean with 200 uses. It can also cast spells, consuming 4 weapon uses (for a maximum of 50 casts).

The spell will cause the player to play a short rock chord and summon geysers in the Ocean around the cast location, dealing 85 damage. If it is casted closely to the Boat, the geysers will create leaks in the boat. The spell can mine for the equivalent of 10 Pickaxe hits, push Items away from the cast location, and uproot Bull Kelp. It can also launch fish into the air to catch them without a Sea Fishing Rod, provided they can fall onto nearby land or a boat.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Proof of Purchase Tide-Turner Trident skin is obtained by purchasing the Wurt Youtooz.
Proof of Purchase
Tide-Turner Trident
A young warrior must learn to turn the tide in their favor.

Tips

  • With its higher damage on the Ocean, it is more efficient to use it while sailing.
  • The trident's cast can also be used to mine Salt Formations in the ocean and kill nearby Cookie Cutters, if one does not wish to risk damaging their boat.
  • After two Gnarwail horns have been collected, the trident can be crafted with a Construction Amulet. Using a Deconstruction Staff on a trident before its durability hits 33% will return two horns, so the same trident can be crafted again without the need to farm more horns.

Trivia

  • The Strident Trident was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
  • It shares the same debug spawn name as the Shipwrecked item Trident. However, its appearance and mechanics differ.
    • Still, they both share the same mechanic of dealing dramatically more damage while on a boat.
  • Despite being a trident, when its spell is cast, a character using it appears to strum it like an electric guitar. It even produces a similar sound.
    • This is reiterated in the description, "Rock out in rocky waters."
  • Wortox's quote is a reference to demons often being depicted with pitchforks, as he is an imp.

Assets

  • Tide-Turner Trident Dropped
  • Tide-Turner Trident Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

The Strident Trident is a Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Return of Them. The Strident Trident Blueprint is dropped by the Crab King upon death. It requires 3 Gnarwail Horns, 4 Kelp Fronds, and 2 Twigs to craft.

The spell will cause the player to play a short rock chord and summon geysers in the Ocean around the cast location, dealing 85 damage. If it is casted closely to the Boat, the geysers will create leaks in the boat. The spell can mine for the equivalent of 10 Pickaxe hits, push Items away from the cast location, and uproot Bull Kelp. The Proof of Purchase Tide-Turner Trident skin is obtained by purchasing the Wurt Youtooz.

Tide-Turner Trident
A young warrior must learn to turn the tide in their favor.
Tips[edit | edit source]
With its higher damage on the Ocean, it is more efficient to use it while sailing.
The trident's cast can also be used to mine Salt Formations in the ocean and kill nearby Cookie Cutters, if one does not wish to risk damaging their boat.
After two Gnarwail horns have been collected, the trident can be crafted with a Construction Amulet. Using a Deconstruction Staff on a trident before its durability hits 33% will return two horns, so the same trident can be crafted again without the need to farm more horns.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Strident Trident was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
It shares the same debug spawn name as the Shipwrecked item Trident. However, its appearance and mechanics differ.
Still, they both share the same mechanic of dealing dramatically more damage while on a boat.
Despite being a trident, when its spell is cast, a character using it appears to strum it like an electric guitar. It even produces a similar sound.
This is reiterated in the description, "Rock out in rocky waters."
Wortox's quote is a reference to demons often being depicted with pitchforks, as he is an imp.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây đinh ba Strid là một Vũ khí độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Bản thiết kế Cây đinh ba Stident bị Vua Cua đánh rơi khi chết. Nó cần 3 Sừng Gnarwail, 4 Lá Tảo Bẹ và 2 Cành Cây để chế tạo.

The Strident Trident [[Blueprint]] is dropped by the [[Crab King]] upon death. It requires 3 [[Gnarwail Horn]]s, 4 [[Kelp Fronds|Kelp Fronds,]] and 2 [[Twigs]] to craft. The Strident Trident can be used as a melee weapon to deal 51 damage on land and 76.5 damage on the [[Ocean]] with 200 uses. It can also cast spells, consuming 4 weapon uses (for a maximum of 50 casts). The spell will cause the player to play a short rock chord and summon geysers in the Ocean around the cast location, dealing 85 damage. If it is casted closely to the [[Boat]], the geysers will create leaks in the boat. The spell can mine for the equivalent of 10 [[Pickaxe]] hits, push [[Items]] away from the cast location, and uproot [[Bull Kelp]]. It can also launch fish into the air to catch them without a [[Sea Fishing Rod]], provided they can fall onto nearby land or a boat. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Weapons Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Proof of Purchase Tide-Turner Trident''' skin is obtained by purchasing the Wurt [[Youtooz]].

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * With its higher damage on the Ocean, it is more efficient to use it while sailing. * The trident's cast can also be used to mine [[Salt Formation]]s in the ocean and kill nearby [[Cookie Cutter]]s, if one does not wish to risk damaging their boat. *After two [[Gnarwail Horn|Gnarwail horns]] have been collected, the trident can be crafted with a [[Construction Amulet|Construction Amulet.]] Using a [[Deconstruction Staff]] on a trident before its durability hits 33% will return two horns, so the same trident can be crafted again without the need to farm more horns. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Strident Trident was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update. * It shares the same debug spawn name as the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' item [[Trident]]. However, its appearance and mechanics differ. **Still, they both share the same mechanic of dealing dramatically more damage while on a boat. * Despite being a trident, when its spell is cast, a character using it appears to strum it like an electric guitar. It even produces a similar sound. **This is reiterated in the description, "''Rock out'' in rocky waters." * Wortox's quote is a reference to demons often being depicted with pitchforks, as he is an imp. == [[File:Research Notes.png|32px]] Assets == Tide-Turner Trident Dropped.png|Tide-Turner Trident Dropped Tide-Turner Trident Equipped.png|Tide-Turner Trident Equipped Tools and Weapons= {{Tools and Weapons}} |-| Craftable Items= {{Craftable Items|tool}} [[vi:Strident Trident]] [[zh:刺耳三叉戟]] [[Category:Return of Them]] [[Category:Equipable Items]] [[Category:Weapons]] [[Category:Melee Weapons]] [[Category:Weapons Filter]]
